title: Through the Portal into the Hepatic Maze
goal: Shift the story from clinical uncertainty into embodied investigation.
dramaticQuestion: What will the detectives notice first once they enter the patient’s liver environment?

beats.beatGoal: Activate the shrinking portal and set the mission stakes.
Orient the audience to the liver landscape.
beats.clueRevealed: The tissue does not look uniformly healthy.

beats.beatGoal: Introduce the first anomaly worth pursuing.
beats.clueRevealed: A suspicious region shows altered architecture.

requiredMedicalTruths: The liver can show background chronic damage before the main tumor is understood.
The first meaningful anomaly should suggest a focal process rather than explain the full diagnosis immediately.
